news.headline: Mizuho raises uniQure stock price target to $68 on FDA meeting optimism
news.summary: Mizuho lifted its price target from $35 to $68, citing positive FDA feedback on the accelerated-approval pathway. It joins a wave of sharp target hikes (RBC ~$65, H.C. Wainwright ~$80, Stifel $71) after the June re-rating. Sell-side sentiment has flipped decisively bullish.

news.headline: uniQure soars as Cantor upgrades on plans to seek gene therapy nod
news.summary: Cantor Fitzgerald upgraded the stock as uniQure moves to concretely prepare the AMT-130 BLA. It underscores that analyst sentiment has clearly turned positive following the FDA pivot. Momentum remains strong into the Q3 filing window.

news.headline: uniQure Closes Upsized $259 Million Public Offering
news.summary: uniQure closed ~5.69M shares at $45.50 for ~$259M gross after underwriters fully exercised the overallotment. Proceeds fund AMT-130 commercialization readiness, a potential launch, and the confirmatory study. The raise de-risks the balance sheet ahead of the costly BLA phase but adds dilution.

news.headline: uniQure Announces Plan for BLA Submission for AMT-130 in Huntington's Disease
news.summary: The pivotal event: the FDA now agrees the ~3-year Phase I/II data can serve as the primary basis for a BLA seeking accelerated approval, reversing prior friction with the agency. Submission is planned for Q3 2026, and the stock jumped roughly +78% on the day. AMT-130 holds RMAT, Breakthrough Therapy and Fast Track designations.

news.headline: FDA Allows AMT-130 Data to Support Planned BLA; UK MHRA filing also planned
news.summary: The high-dose AMT-130 cohort met its primary endpoint at 3 years with 75% slowing of cUHDRS progression versus Enroll-HD external controls. The FDA aims to pre-align on a confirmatory study, potentially using a concurrent standard-of-care control instead of a sham surgery. uniQure also plans a parallel UK MHRA marketing application, opening a second approval market.

news.headline: uniQure hit by wave of high-level insider stock sales ahead of FDA news
news.summary: Several directors and officers sold shares on June 11-12, including a CCO sale of ~16,000 shares near $27 - just before the FDA-driven jump. On a 12-month basis insiders have net sold materially more than bought. A mildly dampening governance signal against an otherwise euphoric tape.

catalysts.label: Q2 2026 earnings (est.)
catalysts.detail: uniQure reports second-quarter results; watch BLA progress, post-raise cash runway, and commercial-readiness spend. Consensus around -$0.75 EPS. Date estimated from historical pattern.

catalysts.label: AMT-130 BLA submission (FDA)
catalysts.detail: The key driver: uniQure plans to file the BLA for AMT-130 in Huntington's under the accelerated-approval pathway in Q3 2026.

catalysts.label: UK MHRA marketing application
catalysts.detail: Parallel marketing authorization application to the UK MHRA based on the same 3-year data, opening a second approval market.

catalysts.label: FDA confirmatory-study design alignment
catalysts.detail: Pre-alignment with the FDA on the required post-approval confirmatory trial, potentially using a concurrent standard-of-care control rather than a sham procedure.

catalysts.label: Potential accelerated approval / PDUFA
catalysts.detail: If the BLA is accepted with priority review, an FDA decision on the first-ever Huntington's gene therapy could land in 2027.

pulse: QURE's story flipped completely after the June 17 FDA agreement: the agency accepted the ~3-year AMT-130 data (75% slowing of cUHDRS) as the basis for an accelerated-approval BLA, sending shares up ~78% and triggering a wave of upgrades (Mizuho $68, RBC ~$65, H.C. Wainwright ~$80). Management moved fast to lock in ~$259M via an upsized offering, removing balance-sheet risk ahead of a potential first commercial launch while adding dilution. The setup is now catalyst-rich and binary, hinging on the Q3 2026 BLA filing, the parallel UK MHRA application, and confirmatory-study alignment, with the ~July 28 Q2 print as the next checkpoint. Sentiment is euphoric and first-mover optimism is high, though insider selling into the run and rich targets warrant caution. This trades as a regulatory-momentum story stock, highly volatile and event-driven rather than fundamentals-driven.
